Descricao1: Hello! My name is Danilo Oliveira and I am a full-stack systems developer at Expertise Solutions, working on the development and maintenance of web applications, focusing on performance, scalability, and best architectural practices. I work on creating complete solutions, from building interfaces to implementing APIs and integrating with databases, directly contributing to the evolution of systems and the optimization of internal processes. I was also an instructor at Tech Inclusão, teaching courses on web service programming and digital marketing.
Descricao2: I have a postgraduate degree in Digital Game Design and Development and actively participate in Game Jams, where I gained prominence as a solo developer of the game Cosmic Maid Café (1st place at the UFT Pequi Game Jam), in addition to developing and working as a Producer/Game Designer/Programmer on games such as Fusion Attack! and Twin Tails. Passionate about games since childhood, I transform this experience into professional practice, combining innovation, creativity, and technology to create meaningful interactive experiences.
Desc_proj: Summary list of projects I produced and/or collaborated on. Projects range from games in javascript or Unity3D to websites in Wordpress, React and Vue.
Contato_desc: If you are starting a project, want to make some kind of proposal or just say hi, feel free to get in touch! I will answer you as soon as possible :)
Game_Desc1_1: Game registered for the DJUFF game jam in progress.
Game_Desc2_1: This project was developed as part of a team where I worked as a Producer / Game & Level Designer / Programmer, balancing, creating levels, GDD, defining scope, etc.
Game_Desc1_2: Winning game of the second edition of the Pequi Jam, currently under development.
Game_Desc2_2: Help Clara collect coffee cups in this distorted-dimension kitchen while racing against time — be careful not to fall or let her inner light fade away.
Game_Desc1_3: My first tag-team fighting game developed in JavaScript as part of my undergraduate thesis project.
Game_Desc2_3: Attack, dodge, or defend against enemy strikes. Once the blue bar is filled, team up with your ally to temporarily merge and unleash a powerful special move!
Game_Desc1_4: A Pokémon-style adventure game I developed using JavaScript and Tiled as a personal study project.
Game_Desc2_4: Focused on turn-based combat mechanics and interactive map building. Due to HTML restrictions, you must click the screen once to activate the background music.
Game_Desc1_5: A simple flapping bird game that i developed in python with Pygames library as a personal study project.
Game_Desc2_5: Focused on learning game creation on python!
Game_Desc1_6: A breaking blocks game that i developed in python with Pygames library as a personal study project.
Game_Desc2_6: Focused on learning and making the first steps in game creation on python!
